DOCKER.NOTE: When running the server inside Docker (docker-compose-dev.yml), it uses the Unix socket to manage containers but connects to them via their IP on the shared network. The 'host' field is used as a fallback if the network IP cannot be determined. To use the TCP proxy instead of the Unix socket, set DOCKER.OPTIONS to { "host": "docker", "port": 2375 } when the proxy runs in the same compose stack/network, or to { "host": "localhost", "port": 2375 } when running the server on the host while the proxy is mapped to 2375 on localhost.
